title: Oracle Service Cloud Training
description:
Oracle Service Cloud training covers concepts from the Basic level to the advanced level.  Whether you are an individual or corporate client we can customize training course content as per your requirement.  And can arrange this Oracle Service Cloud training as per your pace.

This Oracle Service Cloud training helps organizations differentiate their brands by developing lasting, profitable relationships with a unified web, social, and contact center experiences.

Oracle Service Cloud is a business-class software mixture that integrates the power of contact center requisitions and customer service systems in one suitable platform. Oracle Service Cloud is an up-to date Customer Experience (CX) platform that permits enterprises to join with their customers and smoothens customer experience in the customer's channel of choice. After obtaining RightNow Technologies in the year 2011, Oracle now provides their products through RightNow. Oracle Service Cloud which was earlier known as RightNow merges Web, Social and Contact Center experiences for a united, cross-channel customer service solution in the Cloud. Oracle Customer Experience Cloud i.e. Oracle CX Cloud is a set of cloud-based tools for customer relationship management (CRM), dealing, advertising, customer service, e-commerce and other tools, such as configure, price, quote (CPQ) tools. Oracle continues to authorize its customers and delivers great customer experiences with Oracle Service Cloud. In the year 2016, August, release of Oracle Service Cloud adds new proficiencies across the platform, including improvement of Knowledge Advanced, Web Customer Service, Policy Automation and Field Service. Oracle Service Cloud's jointed web customer service and contact center service include practical assistants, live chats, email support, guided purpose, and case management.
